title: PlanBench
description: Evaluate direct PlanBench task_1 plan generation in the unified dataset runtime as an answer-adapter task with official-style extraction plus semantic plan validation.
baseline_summary: A placeholder answer-adapter that returns no plan for the active PlanBench prompt.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher valid-plan rate is better across independently evolved PlanBench prompts.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. This task uses the unified dataset runtime, but it is not an exact-match answer task. Treat solve(question: dict) as the answer-adapter boundary: it receives the public PlanBench prompt payload and must return plan text that the official-style adapter/verifier can extract and semantically validate against the official instance. You may return either a list[str] with one action per step or a newline-separated string of actions. Preserve the declared helper symbols when useful. Do not use browsing or external network access.
